articles.title: Horoscope for Tuesday, April 28, 2026
articles.description:
Moon Alert

After 4:30 a.m., there are no restrictions to shopping or important decisions today. The moon is in Libra.

Aries (March 21-April 19)

A positive day

Today is an example of that song, "If you can't be with the one you love, honey, then love the one you're with." Enjoy the company of spouses, partners and close friends. Be grateful for their presence in your life. Speak up and tell them how much they mean to you.

Taurus (April 20-May 20)

A positive day

Work-related romance and flirtations will make this an interesting day for you. People feel open and mutually attracted to each other. You might see ways to earn more money or make improvements to where you work as well as your health.

Gemini (May 21-June 20)

A dynamic day

Today is full of romantic possibilities, fun flirtations and warm friendships! Venus is in your sign, and the moon is in the most playful part of your chart. Get out and enjoy the company of others. Have fun!

Cancer (June 21-July 22)

A positive day

Family relations will be warm and friendly today. You might see how to get the funding or practical support you need to make improvements at home or help a family member. Meanwhile, some will be in the throes of a secret love affair.

Leo (July 23-Aug. 22)

A positive day

It's easy to feel warmhearted and affectionate toward others today, which will lead to romantic connections for many. Life is too short to look for perfection. Appreciate the opportunities that present themselves to you. And remember: Old age is a privilege afforded to few.

Virgo (Aug. 23-Sept. 22)

A positive day

Although this is a warm, friendly day (and romantic!) — your focus is also on money, earnings and exciting purchases. People admire you today and will ask for your advice on how to make something look more attractive. Have the confidence to share your ideas!

Libra (Sept. 23-Oct. 22)

A dynamic day

This is a fabulous day! The moon is in your sign, dancing with both Pluto and Venus, promoting the possibility of meeting someone unusual who is totally appealing. This could be the beginning of a romance with someone different or someone who is far away. Anything might happen!

Scorpio (Oct. 23-Nov. 21)

A positive day

Although this is a friendly and romantic day, it is also an excellent day in terms of finances, gifts and favors coming your way. Be open to the offers of others because someone or something can enrich your world. Meanwhile, affections are strong and passionate!

Sagittarius (Nov. 22-Dec. 21)

A dynamic day

This is a wonderful day to schmooze with others because your relations will be warm and friendly. You might want to make plans for the future. You will certainly be happy to accept what is happening right now, which is always wise. (The future is yet to come.)

Capricorn (Dec. 22-Jan. 19)

A positive day

You're high-viz today, which means you are likely admired by others, especially at work. Perhaps this is why a work-related romance might begin (at least a flirtation). Your confidence today might help you consider remaking your image. And why not?

Aquarius (Jan. 20-Feb. 18)

A dynamic day

Grab every chance to travel or do something different because you’re hungry for adventure today. This is a great day for romance. Enjoy the company of others and have a good time because the world is your oyster. Look for ways to give someone else a lift to their day.

Pisces (Feb. 19-March 20)

A positive day

Family relations are mutually warm and happy today. You might also see ways to make where you live more beautiful. Someone might give you a gift, an idea, or the money to entertain at home or create a home that is your special, happy refuge.

If today is your birthday

Actress Jessica Alba (1981) shares your birthday today. You are goal-oriented and resourceful. You have physical and mental vigor and organizational talents. This is a year of service for you, probably service to family. Therefore, take care of yourself so you can be a resource to those who turn to you for guidance, courage and comfort.

articles.title: Easterlies to bring rains, thunderstorms over Cebu on Tuesday
articles.description: LAPU-LAPU CITY, Cebu — Cebuanos can expect cloudy skies with rainshowers and thunderstorms on Tuesday, April 28, the state weather bureau reported. In its daily outlook, the Visayas Pagasa Regional Services Division (PRSD) said the rainy weather was caused by the prevailing easterlies, which would also bring warm and humid conditions in the country. READ: Easterlies to bring chances of rain, thunderstorms in Cebu Meanwhile, light to moderate winds and slight to moderate seas are expected throughout the day. Similar conditions have been forecast in Bohol, Negros Oriental, Leyte, and Capiz. Most of the Visayas, Palawan including Kalayaan Islands, and [...]... Keep on reading: Easterlies to bring rains, thunderstorms over Cebu on Tuesday
